video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Ironleaf (feminine ranger with green half-cape and leaf brooch) and Yuna Dawncrest (masculine mage in layered blue robes with neat gloves); Yuna Ironleaf steadies a damaged metal shield on the wooden workbench while Yuna Dawncrest carefully guides a repair tool over the surface, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positions; after ten seconds Yuna Dawncrest taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Ironleaf holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on tool-based shield repair in a fantasy setting. No sexual content, violence, or harmful elements included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge contains a damaged shield requiring collaborative repair; the two Yunas work together to fix the gear.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful collaboration on a shared task.
